actionBuckets.title: Crawl And Access Blockers
actionBuckets.whyItMatters: Blocked docs URLs suppress owned documentation from the main crawl surface and distort downstream summaries.
smallestChangeSet: Update robots.txt so /docs/ is no longer blocked for the target AI crawlers.
Re-run the crawl and confirm the sitemap-backed docs URLs are reachable.

actionBuckets.title: Rendering Root Cause
actionBuckets.whyItMatters: Thin pre-hydration HTML on core product pages makes the site harder to parse and cite reliably.
smallestChangeSet: Fix the rendering path serving thin HTML shells on core product pages.
Verify server-rendered headings and answer-ready copy before opening page-specific copy tasks.

actionBuckets.title: Comparison Template Fixes
actionBuckets.whyItMatters: Template-level omissions create repeated answer-shape and schema problems across /compare/* pages.
smallestChangeSet: Add question-led sections, concise verdict blocks, and evidence tables to the comparison template.
Ship FAQ or Q&A schema on the same template.

actionBuckets.title: Core Page Upgrades
actionBuckets.whyItMatters: A stale setup page on a core onboarding path weakens trust even after the larger crawl and rendering issues are fixed.
smallestChangeSet: Refresh /docs/setup with current screenshots and a visible update timestamp.
Re-check /pricing after the rendering fix before opening extra copy work.

actionBuckets.title: Low-Value Noise Handling
actionBuckets.whyItMatters: Utility routes and legacy URLs should not dominate the remediation track unless they block an important crawl path.
smallestChangeSet: Capture utility-route and legacy-URL cleanup separately from the core remediation track.
Only escalate these URLs if they still rank externally or break important flows.

optionalFollowUps: Map prompt coverage later if prompt-aware evidence becomes available.
Treat llms.txt as optional follow-up work after the core crawl, rendering, and template issues are fixed.
